section.title: Comprehensive Regulatory Solutions
section.description: We provide specialized consulting services tailored to the pharmaceutical and healthcare industries.

services.title: NABH Accreditation
services.shortDescription: Complete guidance for hospitals and healthcare providers to achieve and maintain National Accreditation Board for Hospitals standards.
services.fullDescription: NABH (National Accreditation Board for Hospitals) accreditation is a comprehensive quality assurance program that ensures healthcare organizations meet the highest standards of patient care, safety, and operational excellence.
benefits: Enhanced patient safety and care quality
Compliance with national and international standards

services.title: Pharmacovigilance (PV)
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive drug safety monitoring, adverse event reporting, and risk management planning for pharmaceutical products.
services.fullDescription: Pharmacovigilance is the science and activities relating to the detection, assessment, understanding, and prevention of adverse effects or any other drug-related problems. Our comprehensive PV services ensure regulatory compliance and patient safety.
features: Adverse event case processing and reporting
useCases: Ongoing safety monitoring for marketed products

services.title: MSDS/SDS Authoring
services.shortDescription: Expert authoring of Material Safety Data Sheets compliant with GHS, REACH, and global regulatory requirements.
services.fullDescription: Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) or Safety Data Sheets (SDS) are critical documents that provide comprehensive information about chemical substances and mixtures. Our expert team ensures compliance with GHS, REACH, and other global regulatory frameworks.

services.title: Toxicology Assessments
services.shortDescription: Detailed toxicological risk assessments (TRA), PDE calculation, and impurity profiling for drug substances.
services.fullDescription: Toxicology assessments are essential for evaluating the safety of pharmaceutical products, impurities, and contaminants. Our expert toxicologists provide comprehensive risk assessments to support regulatory submissions and ensure patient safety.
